coins: a string of twelve electrum trade rings
a jar of copper temple tokens
mundane_treasure: a fine wool cloak sealed in wax
a set of ivory gaming pieces
rare blue dye in glass tubes
weird_relics: a bronze eye that weeps near hidden doors
a crown woven from living moths
a stone tongue that answers one question badly
a mirror showing the viewer's last resting place
minor_magic_items: a knife that cuts only rope and bindings
a lantern that reveals fresh blood
cursed_items: a gold ring that makes promises audible
a sword that demands a burial after every battle
a purse that replaces one coin nightly with a tooth
a compass that points toward the owner's greatest fear
clue_items: a wax-sealed letter bearing the reeve's mark
a scrap of a map showing a hidden entrance
a broken amulet matching one worn in town
a ledger recording payments to masked travelers
